past.title: tripleS ASSEMBLE26 <LOVE&POP> pt.1 Leader Gravity
past.description: Decide the Leader for the tripleS ASSEMBLE26 <LOVE&POP> pt.1 promotion!

body.text: Event Gravity

There are 2 candidates for the leader of tripleS's upcoming promotion.

The recommender for each candidate will be revealed after the Gravity ends.
Vote for the leader from the 2 members!
Gravity Rules
This Gravity runs for a total of 2 days, from May 2 at 10:00 to May 3 at 10:00 KST.

The member selected as the ASSEMBLE26 <LOVE&POP> pt.1 leader will be the featured member in the upcoming full-member content.

1,000 Premier Class Objekts of the selected leader will be randomly included in the tripleS <LOVE&POP> pt.1 album.

You can participate in voting multiple times, but each vote allows only one selection.

If you'd like to vote for a different candidate, please participate again.

past.title: 2026 tripleS X 1theK Reality Show Gravity
past.description: Decide the concept for the large-scale variety show tripleS will present with 1theK this year!

body.text: Event Gravity
This is the Gravity to determine the theme of tripleS’ next variety show, following the Badge War season 3.
Choose one of the 2 candidates!
Gravity Rules
This Gravity will be held for 3 days, from April 23rd, 19:00 to April 25th, 19:00 KST.

The show with the most votes out of the 2 candidates will come to you with 1theK this year.

You can vote multiple times, but you can only make one selection per vote.

If you'd like to vote for a different option, please participate again.

past.title: tripleS ASSEMBLE26 Love Side Title Track Gravity
past.description: Decide whether the title track for the Love Side will be a WAV pick or a MODHAUS pick.

body.text: Event Gravity

Love & Pop you’ve been waiting for, WAV!

A new vote is now open to decide the title track for Love Side, the very first chapter of tripleS Assemble26!

If the WAV pick is selected, the title track for the Love Side will be decided through a Grand Gravity.

If MODHAUS pick is selected, the title track for the Love Side will be chosen directly by MODHAUS, and the album will be prepared without a Grand Gravity.

So, whose pick will determine this title track?
Gravity Rules
This Gravity will take place from February 9 at 11:00 to February 11 at 11:00 (KST).

You can participate in the vote multiple times, but only one choice can be made per vote.

If you’d like to vote for a different pick, submit another vote.

past.title: <My Secret New Zone> Performance Gravity zenith
past.description: WAV, pick the unit stages you want to see on the <My Secret New Zone> concert!

body.text: Event Gravity

A mysterious and brand new space created together by WAV and tripleS, My Secret New Zone. Vote in the Gravity to choose the song that will open its very first page. 

On this tour, each unit m, s, n, z will perform tripleS songs reinterpreted through their own unique colors.

Each candidate song has been personally selected by the members. 

WAV, decide which unit stages will be showcased on the My Secret New Zone tour with your vote!
Gravity Rules
This Gravity will be held from January 19th, 11:00 ~ January 20th, 09:00 KST

The final selected songs will be performed as unit stages, and please note that depending on the voting results, some units may perform the same song. 

You can vote multiple times, 
but can only make one choice per vote. 

If you want to choose another song,
please vote again.

body.text: Event Gravity

A new journey for tripleS, reaching for the whole world.

The tripleS World Tour ‘Alpha Percent’ is ready to take the stage.

One special song, reserved for this moment, will be chosen by you, WAV.

Four songs, that once fell short in past Gravities, have remained deep in our hearts. Fueled by the passionate desire of WAV, the chance has come to revive the one song you missed the most on the world tour stage.

The winning song will be reborn as an English version, performed for the very first time on this tour.

Which song will rise again and claim its place on the ‘Alpha Percent’ stage?

Your choice will complete this moment.
Gravity Rules
This Gravity will be held from July 3rd, 11:00 ~ July 5th, 11:00 KST

but can only make one choice per vote.

please vote again.

body.text: Gravity Hint

Create the DIMENSIONs after listening to the tracks
 the two DIMENSIONs will perform.

EVOLution [ˌevə|luːʃn]
'High-Tech Dance, Extraordinary, Stylish'

LOVElution [ləv|luːʃn]
'General, Pop, Love'
Information

WAV, create new DIMENSIONs 
for the first Binary01 Grand Gravity.
Two Big WAVes, Two DIMENSIONs.

The two DIMENSIONs are EVOLution
and LOVElution.

EVOLution will perform High-Tech Pop Dance
and LOVElution will perform
the most generalized music in K-pop.
Gravity Rules

Fri, April 21st ~ Mon, May 1st KST,
For a total of 11 days, there will be a Gravity to determine the DIMENSIONs, followed by a second Gravity to determine the order of debut.

Each DIMENSION will be composed of 8 members, and
the DIMENSIONs for 14 S will be decided through the Grand Gravity. Unrevealed members will join each DIMENSION as Hidden Cards, S15 will join EVOLution,
and S16 will join LOVElution.
Once the two DIMENSIONs are formed, a second Gravity will be held to determine the debut order for the two DIMENSIONs. This Gravity will run for two days.
You can vote multiple times but make only one choice in one poll. If you want to make another choice, please vote again.
Thank you for your active participation and love WAV!

Choose Our
Fandom Name
past.description:
Numerous ideas were gathered through Pre-Gravity.
Time to choose our final Fandom Name.

body.text: Fandom Name Gravity

Official Fandom Name Gravity begins for 
tripleS, the idol of all possibilities.
Gravity Information

Hi, tripleS! This is tripleS. 

KRE, AAA, and Rising were born with the last two Gravities. Thanks for all the support you’ve sent us. Now the 3rd Gravity finally begins. It's time to decide on our fandom name, which will represent us fans who love tripleS!

Among the brilliant ideas gathered through Pre-Gravity, held on Discord over the past ten days.
The tripleS members and JADEN selected seven candidates. Let's decide on the last fandom name together.

This Gravity will last for 2 days. The name that you chose the most becomes our final fandom name.

Please support the best fandom name of your choice!
Gravity Rules
This Gravity is held between April 8th, 18:00 (KST) to  April 10th (KST), 18:00. For a total of 48 hours.

You can vote multiple times,
But, you can only make one choice in one poll.
If you want to make another choice,
please vote again.

Thanks for all the support you have shown.
I can’t wait to see the final result!
